problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
